Everything You Need to Succeed

A complete video platform solution with all the features you need to grow your audience.

Lightning Fast

Built on modern architecture for blazing fast video streaming and page loads.

White-Label

Fully customizable branding with your logo, colors, and domain.

Analytics

Comprehensive analytics dashboard with real-time metrics and insights.

Secure

Enterprise-grade security with role-based access control and encryption.

Scalable

Grow from hundreds to millions of users with our cloud-native platform.

Easy Setup

Launch your video platform in minutes with our intuitive setup wizard.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that's right for you. No hidden fees.

Starter

Perfect for getting started

$29 /month
  • Up to 100 videos
  • 10GB storage
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
  • Custom branding
Most Popular

Professional

For growing businesses

$99 /month
  • Up to 1,000 videos
  • 100GB storage
  • Advanced analytics
  • Priority support
  • Custom domain
  • API access

Enterprise

For large organizations

Custom
  • Unlimited videos
  • Unlimited storage
  • Custom analytics
  • 24/7 phone support
  • White-label license
  • SLA guarantee
